tagline: Expert vibe coder, agent designer, and AI enthusiast
about: Passionate about building high-impact products that solve real problems for real users.
Founding engineer behind BrowserOS, OSlash, and the Pickyourtrail mobile app.
Been architecting and shipping scalable products from scratch — long before AI started writing the code.

skills.label: Front-End
skills.text: React, Next.js, Expo, React Router, shadcn/UI, TanStack libraries, Radix UI

skills.label: Mobile
skills.text: React Native, Expo — cross-platform Android & iOS (100k+ downloads)

skills.label: State Management
skills.text: Redux, Zustand, React Query, Signals, XState, Nano Stores

skills.label: Rendering
skills.text: SSR, SSG, ISR, Server Components, Streaming SSR, Edge Rendering

skills.label: Infrastructure
skills.text: AWS Lambda, Serverless Stack, Cloudflare Workers, Vercel Edge Middleware

skills.label: API Design
skills.text: REST, GraphQL, Relay, urql, The Guild tooling

jobs.title: Clarifai — Senior Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: AI platform that helps users build complex AI workflows by combining various models.
contributions: Clarifai Node.js SDK: Created a fully tested, typesafe SDK for integrating Clarifai into Node.js backends with auto-generated API documentation.
AI Workflow Builder: Spearheaded the development of a drag-and-drop workflow builder using React Flow and shadcn/UI — one of Clarifai's core features.
API Documentation: Set up Swagger-based API documentation for gRPC APIs using grpc-gateway with detailed code snippets for core SDK functionalities.
Release Automation: Established automated release process with changelog updates, SEO best practices, and integrated analytics.

jobs.title: Wundergraph — Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description: GraphQL gateway for managing federated GraphQL, positioned as an alternative to Apollo Federation.
contributions: Client SDKs: Created client SDKs for Svelte, Relay, and Expo — well-documented, tested, and widely adopted by customers.
Open Previews: Built an internal tool similar to Vercel's preview comments feature, later open-sourced.
Community: Participated in Show & Tell videos on YouTube and actively engaged with the community on Discord.

jobs.title: OSlash — Lead Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Started as founding lead engineer for the Chrome extension, promoted to Engineering Manager after successful v1 delivery.
contributions: Chrome Extension: Led development of OSlash's Chrome extension from inception to launch.
Full-Stack: Used Next.js as full-stack framework for the main dashboard, Astro for performance-critical micro frontends using Islands Architecture.
Design System: Developed and maintained a custom design system using Tailwind CSS.
GraphQL Federation: Designed a serverless GraphQL federation with edge caching, authorization, rate limiting, and comprehensive error/metrics visibility.

jobs.title: Pickyourtrail — Software Engineer
jobs.description: Digital travel assistant. Key role in building the mobile app and advancing the tech stack.
contributions: Mobile App: Built the Pickyourtrail app for Android & iOS using React Native — 5-star rating on Google Play, 100k+ downloads.
TypeScript Integration: Led the successful integration of TypeScript into the existing web app.
Open Source: Actively contributed by open-sourcing modules created for the app in React Native Toolkit.

jobs.title: Redblacktree — Software Engineer
contributions: Cross-Platform Apps: Developed two cross-platform mobile apps using React Native with full offline functionality.
Windows App: Built a Windows app for UWP, published on the Windows Store, using a custom React.js-based framework.
Research: Assisted teams on Node.js and Vue.js projects while researching JavaScript development improvements.

jobs.title: doodleblue — Web Developer
contributions: Full-Stack: Led the development of full-stack applications using Laravel and built APIs for web and mobile apps.
Team Leadership: Promoted to team lead for a company-wide initiative to adopt React.js, React Native, Laravel, and Node.js.

community.title: Conference & Meetup Speaker
community.description: Active speaker at public meetups and conferences since 2017. All talks available on the speaking page.

community.title: React Native Docs Contributor
community.description: Written updated documentation for many components of the official React Native docs including Animated and PanResponder.

community.title: Open Source Projects
community.description: Built many projects for the React & React Native community including BetterImage, Rex State, Responsive Dimensions, and more at github.com/daniakash.

community.title: Author — JavaScript By Example (2017)
community.description: Published by PACKT. A book covering modern JavaScript programming with real web apps.

education.degree: BE Computer Science & Engineering — 2012 to 2016, Chennai
education.description: Active participant in IEEE student council and Computer Society of India student team, helping with building websites for events and actively organizing contests and symposiums.
